jobs.title: Software Engineering Intern
jobs.content: <h2>About the role</h2><p>Join our engineering team for a 3-month internship. Paris, France office available. Starting September 2026.</p><ul><li>Work on distributed systems</li><li>Collaborate with senior engineers</li></ul>

jobs.title: Research Internship - ML Safety
jobs.content: <p>6-month research internship in ML safety. Based in Paris, France. September 2026 start.</p>
